name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Eight Copilot CLI extensions: five multi-model orchestrators; Crucible, an autonomous evidence-judged investigation runner; zerotrust-sourcecheck, a 32-role source security council with hardened runtime wrappers; and mcp-autoreload for stale MCP recovery.

scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.workspace-fast.config.mjs && npm run test:crucible && node --test "zerotrust-sourcecheck/__tests__/*.test.mjs"
scripts.test:crucible:release: npm run test:crucible && npm run test:crucible:release-safe && npm run test:crucible:science && npm run test:crucible:unattended-release
scripts.test:release: npm test && npm run test:crucible:release-safe && npm run test:crucible:science && npm run test:crucible:unattended-release
